versions.label: v0

notes.text: [PRINT] Print-in-place two-start spiral fidget — print flat on the base, NO supports, NO raft. Use thin layers (0.12-0.16 mm) and 100% part cooling so each spiral solidifies before the next layer is laid down; thick layers or weak cooling let adjacent blades bond. 3-4 walls, 15-20% infill, PLA. After printing, give it a firm first twist to free the blades — they screw apart. If the blades fuse: raise the Print clearance parameter, lower Spiral turns (steeper helix prints cleaner), or enlarge the Central bore. componentCount === 2 (one per arm).

[WORKFLOW] Drive this app via window.partwright (see /ai.md). Use runAndSave(code, label, assertions) for iterations; after structural changes verify visually via renderViews (use views:"box" for an all-faces final check); addSessionNote with [REQUIREMENT]/[DECISION]/[MEASUREMENT]/[FEEDBACK]/[ATTEMPT]/[TODO] prefixes; getSessionContext() when resuming.
